title: Nyan Cat Origin
description: An Origin allowing the player to play as Nyan Cat, complete with sounds in a resource pack.
body:
## Nyan Cat is a cat-cherry pop-tart, flying through space, leaving a trail...

### 💗 Momentum
If you are moving, you gain momentum, and stars that empower you.

### ⏩ Velocity
You move faster and jump higher the more momentum you have.

### ☁️ Dampening
When you have a blue star, you take no fall damage, and lose momentum instead.

### 💧 Resonance
When you have a blue star you can bounce on water.

This slows you down.

### 🌈 Iconic
(secondary toggle ability)
With a purple star you can jump midair at the cost of momentum.

Also emit a rainbow trail! 

### ⭐ Imaginary Inertia
(primary active)

When you have a gold star, you can activate to phase through blocks.

Also plays a sound bit from Nyan Cat (on the Music track).

### 💀 Entropy
While you are still, you gather entropy, causing you to weaken and slow.

Constantly moving increases the time before this effect starts stacking.

### ❌ Needless
You won't use rockets.

### 🛑 Negated

If you get hit, your velocity and momentum are set to 0, and you get immobilized for 2s.

This also stops the song playing for nearby players.

(10 second cooldown)


-----

RESOURCE PACK is needed for sounds and the gui.

If the Origin is not working without them; change the Gui at powers/momentum and powers/imaginary. Change the sound at powers/sound and powers/whenhit.

There are extra sounds included in the pack, including the full song.

The sounds sound really funny when you change the pitch:

playsound minecraft:nyancat.nyanloop2 music @a ~ ~ ~ 1 0.8

(use stopsound @a to stop it)

-----
Tested in 1.19.2+

Ability descriptions are for v2
